core.label: Stata Fundamentals
core.description: Statistical software for research and economics.

topics.label: Stata Interface
topics.description: Command window, variables window, do-file editor. Stata is interactive and scriptable.

topics.label: Data Management
topics.description: use, import, describe, browse, sort, generate, replace, drop, keep.

topics.label: Regression
topics.description: regress, logit, probit. Interpret coefficients, p-values, and R-squared.

topics.label: Do-Files & Loops
topics.description: Write scripts in .do files. forvalues, foreach, while for automation.

topics.label: Graphs
topics.description: graph twoway, histogram, boxplot, scatter. Publication-quality plots.

topics.label: Panel Data
topics.description: xtset, xtreg, xtlogit. Fixed and random effects models.

topics.label: Macros & Programs
topics.description: local, global macros, and program for custom commands.
